examples: The theory sounds eccentric but once he starts to explain the detective work that went into his deduction, the scepticism gives way to wary admiration.

A survey reflects business scepticism about the strength of the economic recovery.
He is not alone in voicing scepticism about the long-term appeal of organic cotton.
When Uefa president Michel Platini first announced these plans, there was a lot of scepticism.
